textToCopy.description: Text that will be copied to clipboard when copy function is executed.

beforeMessage.description: Tooltip message displayed before copy function is called.

afterMessage.description:
Tooltip message displayed after copy function is called that lets the user know that
'textToCopy' has been copied to the clipboard.

children.description:
Function that must return a component. First argument is 'copy' function.
Use your own logic to create the component that users interact with when triggering copy.

tooltipProps.description: Optional props to pass to the EuiToolTip component.
